title: New directors appointed at SWD cricket
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The newly appointed directors...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The newly appointed directors of the South Western Districts Cricket (SWDC) non-profit company are Jason Kiewit (chairperson of the social and ethics board committee), Micheal Eksteen (president and chairperson of the board) and Bevan Cassim (chairperson of the human resource and remuneration board committee).","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The newly appointed directors of the South Western Districts Cricket (SWDC) non-profit company are Jason Kiewit (chairperson of the social and ethics board committee), Micheal Eksteen (president and chairperson of the board) and Bevan Cassim (chairperson of the human resource and remuneration board committee)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This follows the end of the tenure of chairpersons Maurice Ellis (social and ethics board committee) and Reginald Salmons (human resource and remuneration board committee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The announcement was made during the SWD Cricket's annual general meeting held on 9 August.","html":"The announcement was made during the SWD Cricket's annual general meeting held on 9 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: New directors appointed at SWD cricket
